target: Vocabulary Engine for IELTS - Learn Mode, Practice Mode, Quiz Mode (Phase 1)
summary: All Vocabulary Engine features working correctly. Backend: 17/17 pytest tests passed. Frontend: All 3 modes (Learn, Practice, Quiz) fully functional with correct UI/UX, navigation flows working from Advanced Mastery Course page CTA.

features_tested.notes: Returns 28 slides with word, IPA, meaning, example, category, collocations, common_mistake, word_formations
Returns 25 exercises including fill_blank and matching types with options, hints, answers
Returns 10 questions with 80% passing score threshold
Accepts answers, calculates pass/fail based on 80% threshold, saves to database
Full-screen slide view with word, IPA, meaning, example, category badges, TTS button, flip card animation, prev/next navigation, keyboard support, progress bar (1/28), Word Formation modal
Fill-in-blank with 4 options, hints, matching exercises, score tracking (0/0 -> updates), progress bar, completion screen with score, Try Again and Mastery Quiz buttons
10 multiple choice questions, A/B/C/D options, Previous/Next navigation, dot indicators for question progress, Submit Quiz button (disabled until all answered)

features_tested.feature: Navigation: Advanced Mastery -> Vocabulary CTA -> Learn Mode
features_tested.notes: 'Interactive Vocabulary Engine' section with 'Start Learning' CTA navigates to /vocabulary/learn/advanced-module-1
'Continue to Practice' button after viewing all slides navigates to Practice Mode
'Mastery Quiz' button on completion screen navigates to Quiz Mode

seed_data_creation: None - uses existing advanced-module-1 data in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vocabulary Engine Phase 1 fully tested. Key flows: 1) Learn Mode shows 28 slides with flip cards, TTS, word formations modal. 2) Practice Mode has 25 exercises (fill_blank + matching) with hints and score tracking. 3) Quiz Mode has 10 questions with 80% pass threshold. Navigation: Advanced Mastery page > Module Detail > 'Start Learning' CTA > Learn Mode > Practice > Quiz. All data-testid attributes are in place for all interactive elements.
